name: TSC Type Checker
description: Automatically run TypeScript type checking after agent edits .ts/.tsx files. Injects errors into conversation so the agent can fix them.
author: ihf

variables.name: ENABLED_AGENTS
variables.label: Enabled Agent IDs
variables.description: Comma-separated agent IDs to enable tsc for. Leave empty to enable for all agents.

variables.name: TSC_ARGS
variables.label: Extra tsc arguments
variables.description: Extra arguments passed to tsc. Default: --noEmit (type check only, no output files).
